formatting_preferences: Use markdown headers and bullet points for readability

When directly attributing a statement or position to a specific Councilor or speaker, include an inline timestamp citation in the format [HH:MM:SS] so the reader can jump to that moment in the YouTube video. Apply this throughout all sections of the summary.
standing_instructions: Do NOT include an Oakleaf Relevance Score section in the summary.
Do NOT include a Public Testimony Highlights section in the summary.
